name: Pendo
tagline: Product experience platform with analytics and in-app guides
description: Pendo combines product analytics with in-app guides, surveys, and feedback tools. It's designed to help product teams understand user behaviour AND act on it — showing tooltips, walkthroughs, and announcements without engineering resources.
pros: Unique combo of analytics + in-app guidance
use_cases: Your product team wants to see feature adoption analytics AND create in-app tooltips or walkthroughs to improve it — without writing code
You want to run NPS surveys inside your product and tie the responses directly to usage data and user segments
Your customer success team needs to onboard users with guided walkthroughs and announcements that can be updated without an engineering sprint
You manage multiple products or a platform with sub-apps and need cross-app analytics under a single Portfolio view
